title: 天才ウマ娘、スクランブル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day for tryouts. The academy's up-and-coming runners
participate in order to prove their skills to the prospective trainers
who've come to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wondering what this fresh batch of newcomers has to show, I also
make my way to the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'mooon! I wanna run too! Let me gooo iiin!

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun, please behave yourself. You can't just run onto the
track without permission! Goodness, you're too fast for your own
good...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I don't caaare! I wanna race toooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A short distance away from the track, I spot Mayano Top Gun and the
race attendant butting heads.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thbbft! Catch me if you can! ...Bwah?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Attempting to flee, Mayano Top Gun dashes away, bumping into me
in the process. Without so much as a second thought, I catch her
mid-fall.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Uhhhh, sorry! Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I-I'm okay... since you caught me and everything.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... You're actually pretty nice! You a new trainer? My name's
Mayano Top Gun!

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, perfect timing. Would you mind watching her and making sure she
doesn't run off onto the racetrack? I'd really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, whaaat? What'd you say yes for?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I thought you were a nice trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's with the commotion?

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Staff A
text_block_list.text: Runners, it's time. Please prepare yourselves for the race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm... it's time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the whining and nagging continues, Mayano Top Gun is
unable to get her way, and the race proceeds without her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers are off to a fantastic start! All eyes are on Narita Brian!
What kind of performance can we expect to see from her today?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Too slow.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Look at her go! Narita Brian is closing in on the front!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Awww, must be nice to be able to race... I wanted to run toooo! This
is so boooring!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, could we at least chat about something? Do you have any funny
stories?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun continues to pester me, but she suddenly shifts her
gaze in the direction of the course and mutters something under her
breath.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh man, that scary-looking girl looks like she's about to go whoosh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Mayano Top Gun predicted, Narita Brian picks up her pace
and bolts forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's like she knew what was going to happen next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Was it coincidence? Or is it something else entirely?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is flying ahead! She's weaving her way through the other
racers! Her eyes are set on first place!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, that racer in second place...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Mayano Top Gun, and without thinking, turn my attention
toward the second place runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From her current position, as long as she times it right, she could
prevent Narita Brian from overtaking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If executed successfully, she will even gain an open path into the
homestretch.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If she goes for it like bam at the right time, then all she has to do is go zoom until she reaches the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The right time is... ah, now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Outta my way!

text_block_list.name: Second-place Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wah! No waaay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aw, maaan. She totally blew it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the other Umamusume has lost her chance to maintain her
lead, Mayano Top Gun's read of the situation was impeccable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she had been the one out there running, then perhaps the outcome
would've been different...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: C'mon, why couldn't I run in today's race?! This sucks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's up with you? Why are you staring at me like that?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... Have you fallen head over heels for me?! Oh my gosh, I really am that cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race ended in a resounding victory for Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the trainers are clamoring around her in hopes of scouting such a
promising talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I, on the other hand, have something else on my mind...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh man, that scary-looking girl looks like she's about to go whoosh.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If she goes for it like bam at the right time, then all she has to do is go zoom until she reaches the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mayano Top Gun may lack eloquence, the young racer's
understanding of the race and its competitors was on another level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel like I have only caught a glimpse of the raw
potential she possesses...
